---
title: ""
format: html
---

<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Volkan Işık">
  </div>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Assoc. Prof. Dr. Volkan Işık</h1>

    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      Labour Economics | Social Policy | Social Entrepreneurship
    </p>

    <p class="hero-affiliation">
      Hacettepe University<br>
      Vocational School of Social Sciences
    </p>

    <p class="hero-email">📧 volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr</p>

    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/do%C3%A7-dr-volkan-%C4%B1%C5%9F%C4%B1k-79150bbb/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://x.com/volkannisik" target="_blank">Twitter</a>
      <a href="https://avesis.hacettepe.edu.tr/volkani" target="_blank">Avesis</a>
      <a href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ADT-9246-2022" target="_blank">Web of Science</a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3690-969X" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a class="main-btn" href="./cv.html">View CV</a>
      <a class="secondary-btn" href="./publications.html">Publications</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Recent Posts
## 📝 Recent Posts

::: {.listing}
contents: blog
sort: "date desc"
type: default
fields: [title, date]
max-items: 5
:::
